statement.headerDoc:
STEP 965 — Differential Geometry and Geometric Analysis Open Problems
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Five open problems in differential geometry and geometric analysis:

  A. POINCARÉ CONJECTURE (PROVED, Perelman 2003)
     Every compact simply-connected 3-manifold is homeomorphic to S³.
     STATUS: PROVED by Perelman using Ricci flow with surgery (2002-2003).

  B. YAU'S CONJECTURE ON EIGENFUNCTIONS (partial)
     Eigenfunctions of the Laplacian on a Riemannian manifold have
     nodal sets of (n-1)-dimensional measure comparable to √λ.
     STATUS: OPEN in general. Logunov-Malinnikova 2018: proved th
